productName: DBG Mini 5 pack - 2.5g - Ice Cream Mintz (Pinnacle) & Sundae Driver (Grow Bros) (I) DOH
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Ice Cream Cake and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of vanilla, butter, and pepper, delivering a versatile, anytime balance. Pace yourself.
